## ARE Skills

The three `okhp3-*` skills are the extractable agent logic layer of the Abrahamic Reference Engine. They are standalone Markdown files usable in any agent platform that supports skill/context injection (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.). Distributed via https://github.com/OKHP3/skillz.

| Skill | Use when... |
|-------|-------------|
| [okhp3-verse-lookup](okhp3-verse-lookup/SKILL.md) | You need to fetch a specific scripture reference from Sefaria, bible-api.com, or Quran.com |
| [okhp3-cross-tradition-compare](okhp3-cross-tradition-compare/SKILL.md) | You need to find parallel passages across two or three Abrahamic traditions on a shared theme |
| [okhp3-tradition-reference](okhp3-tradition-reference/SKILL.md) | You need authoritative metadata about a tradition's canon, translations, US share, or API provider |
